title: OpenAI proposes handing Trump administration 5% stake
abstract: This tool analyzes and summarizes proposals related to the transfer of responsibilities from OpenAI to the Trump administration, providing insightful见解 for policymakers and researchers.
abstract_zh: 这工具就分析那些从OpenAI转移到特朗普政府的职责提案，给政客和研究人员们提供金点子，好好听我说，想想你要是特朗普或者民主党人看到这些转移肯定会乐疯了，简直是接地气的把脉良策！
